invoice.invoice_profile_hint: Diese Standardoption ist das neueste Profil gemäß der EU-Rechnungsrichtlinie
Your address information is not complete: Ihre Adressinformationen sind unvollständig. Es wird empfohlen, Ihre Adressinformationen vor der Erstellung einer Rechnung zu vervollständigen. Möchten Sie fortfahren?
Your subscription is past due. Please up: Ihr Abonnement ist überfällig. Bitte aktualisieren Sie Ihre Zahlungsdetails.
Average revenue per user (ARPU) overview: Übersicht über den durchschnittlichen Umsatz pro Benutzer (ARPU)
ARPU takes into account all users, inclu: ARPU berücksichtigt alle Benutzer, einschließlich derjenigen, die gekündigt haben oder nie abonniert haben.
MRR takes into account only active subsc: MRR berücksichtigt nur aktive Abonnements (keine Testversionen).
Churn rate is the % of users who cancel: Die Kündigungsrate ist der % der Benutzer, die ihr Abonnement jeden Monat kündigen.
Total Revenue is the total revenue gener: Die Gesamteinnahmen sind die insgesamt generierten Einnahmen.
Average User Subscription Conversion is: Die durchschnittliche Benutzerabonnementsumwandlung ist der % der Benutzer, die sich für einen Plan im Verhältnis zu den gesamten Benutzern abonniert haben.
Enter price in lowest denomination for a: Geben Sie den Preis in der niedrigsten Währungseinheit an (Cent). Z.B. 1000 = 10,00
The selected payment provider is not Lem: Der ausgewählte Zahlungsanbieter ist nicht Lemon Squeezy.
The product with the variant ID :variant: Das Produkt mit der Varianten-ID :variantId wurde gefunden und stimmt mit den Produktdetails Ihres Plans überein.
This plan has subscriptions and cannot b: Dieser Plan hat Abonnements und kann nicht gelöscht werden.
A short description of the post (will be: Eine kurze Beschreibung des Beitrags (wird in Meta-Tags verwendet).
Will be used in the URL of the post. Lea: Wird in der URL des Beitrags verwendet. Lassen Sie es leer, um den Slug automatisch aus dem Titel zu generieren.
Author: Autor
If you choose percentage, enter a number: Wenn Sie Prozentsatz wählen, geben Sie eine Zahl zwischen 0 und 100 ein. Zum Beispiel: 90 für 90%. Für einen festen Betrag geben Sie den Betrag in Cent ein. Zum Beispiel: 1000 für 10,00 $.
Select the plans that this discount will: Wählen Sie die Pläne aus, auf die dieser Rabatt angewendet wird. Wenn Sie leer lassen, wird der Rabatt auf alle Pläne angewendet.
Select the one-time products that this d: Wählen Sie die Produkte für einmaligen Kauf aus, auf die dieser Rabatt angewendet wird. Wenn Sie leer lassen, wird der Rabatt auf alle Produkte für einmaligen Kauf angewendet.
Enter -1 for unlimited redemptions (tota: Geben Sie -1 für unbegrenzte Einlösungen (insgesamt) ein.
Enter -1 for unlimited redemptions per u: Geben Sie -1 für unbegrenzte Einlösungen pro Benutzer ein.
If enabled, this discount will keep bein: Wenn aktiviert, wird dieser Rabatt dauerhaft auf das Abonnement angewendet (oder bis zur Gültigkeit, wenn Sie ein maximales Gültigkeitsdatum festgelegt haben).
This allows you define how many months t: Dies ermöglicht es Ihnen, festzulegen, für wie viele Monate der Rabatt gelten soll. Funktioniert nur mit Zahlungsanbietern, die diese Funktion unterstützen. (wie Stripe oder Lemon Squeezy)
Amount of subscription billing periods t: Anzahl der Abrechnungszeiträume für Abonnements, für die dieser Rabatt wiederkehrt. Funktioniert nur mit Zahlungsanbietern, die diese Funktion unterstützen. (wie Paddle)
Leave empty to generate slug automatical: Lassen Sie es leer, um den Slug automatisch aus dem Produktnamen zu generieren.
The maximum quantity of this product tha: Die maximale Menge dieses Produkts, die auf einmal gekauft werden kann. Wenn auf 1 gesetzt, können Kunden die Menge auf der Checkout-Seite nicht ändern.
If the product is not active, your custo: Wenn das Produkt nicht aktiv ist, können Ihre Kunden es nicht kaufen.
Fügen Sie diesem Produkt zusätzliche Daten hinzu. Sie können dies verwenden, um Produktmerkmale zu speichern, die später abgerufen werden können, um Ihren Benutzern zu dienen.
Add features that this product offers. T: Fügen Sie Funktionen hinzu, die dieses Produkt bietet. Diese werden auf der Checkout-Seite angezeigt.
A one-time purchase product is a non-rec: Ein Produkt für einmaligen Kauf ist ein nicht wiederkehrendes Produkt, das einmal zu einem bestimmten Preis gekauft wird.
Leave empty to generate slug automatical: Lassen Sie es leer, um den Slug automatisch aus dem Produktnamen und Intervall zu generieren.
The number of intervals (weeks, months,: Die Anzahl der Intervalle (Wochen, Monate usw.) zwischen jedem Abrechnungszyklus.
The interval (week, month, etc) between: Das Intervall (Woche, Monat usw.) zwischen jedem Abrechnungszyklus.
Plans are the different tiers of your pr: Pläne sind die verschiedenen Stufen Ihres Produkts, die Sie Ihren Kunden anbieten.
For example: if you have Starter, Pro an: Beispielsweise: Wenn Sie Starter-, Pro- und Premium-Produkte haben, würden Sie monatliche und jährliche Pläne für jedes dieser Produkte erstellen, um sie in verschiedenen Intervallen anzubieten.
Mark this product as popular. This will: Markieren Sie dieses Produkt als beliebt. Dies wird verwendet, um dieses Produkt auf der Preis-Seite hervorzuheben.
A default product is a kind of a hidden: Ein Standardprodukt ist eine Art verstecktes Produkt, das es Ihnen ermöglicht, die Funktionen (und Metadaten) für Benutzer festzulegen, die kein aktives Abonnement haben. Fügen Sie ein Standardprodukt hinzu, wenn Sie Ihren Benutzern eine kostenlose Stufe anbieten möchten. Sie können nur 1 Standardprodukt haben und es kann keine Pläne haben.
Add features that this plan offers. Thes: Fügen Sie Funktionen hinzu, die dieser Plan bietet. Diese werden auf der Preis-Seite und auf der Checkout-Seite angezeigt.
A product is bundle of features that you: Ein Produkt ist ein Bündel von Funktionen, die Sie Ihren Kunden anbieten.
If you want to provide a Starter, Pro an: Wenn Sie Ihren Kunden Starter-, Pro- und Premium-Angebote anbieten möchten, erstellen Sie ein Produkt für jedes dieser Angebote.
The code that will be used to redeem the: Der Code, der zur Einlösung des Rabatts verwendet wird.
The prefix will be added to the beginnin: Das Präfix wird jedem Code vorangestellt.
Die Anzahl der zu generierenden Codes.
Test Email Failed To Send with message:: Test-E-Mail konnte nicht gesendet werden mit der Nachricht:
Test Email Queued For Sending, check \/h: Test-E-Mail zur Zustellung in die Warteschlange gestellt, prüfen Sie /horizon, um zu sehen, ob sie gesendet wurde.
This product has plans and cannot be del: Dieses Produkt hat Pläne und kann nicht gelöscht werden.
Important: Plan change will happen immed: Wichtig: Die Planänderung erfolgt sofort, und je nach den von Ihnen festgelegten Verrechnungseinstellungen kann der Benutzer sofort den vollen Preis des Plans in Rechnung gestellt werden oder es wird eine Verrechnung angewendet.
You need to select a different plan to c: Sie müssen einen anderen Plan auswählen, um zu wechseln.
Subscription will be cancelled at the en: Das Abonnement wird am Ende des Abrechnungszeitraums gekündigt.
Subscription cancellation discard failed: Kündigung des Abonnements konnte nicht verworfen werden.
The name of the payment provider (shown: Der Name des Zahlungsanbieters (auf der Checkout-Seite angezeigt).
Deactivating this payment provider will: Wenn Sie diesen Zahlungsanbieter deaktivieren, kann er nicht mehr für neue und alte Abonnements verwendet werden. Kunden können ihre Dienstleistungen nicht bezahlen, also VORSICHTIG VERWENDEN.
Leave empty to generate slug automatical: Leer lassen, um den Slug automatisch zu generieren.
Sie sind bereits für diesen Plan angemeldet.
inovice.main.subject: [:Legalname] Erinnerung an Rechnung: RG :rgnr
The Stripe publishable key is used to au: The Stripe publishable key is used to authenticate requests from the Stripe JavaScript library. Check out the Stripe documentation for more information.
The Stripe secret key is used to authent: The Stripe secret key is used to authenticate requests to the Stripe API. Check out the Stripe documentation for more information.
The Stripe webhook signing secret is use: The Stripe webhook signing secret is used to verify that incoming webhooks are from Stripe. Check out the Stripe documentation for more information.
If enabled, an open graph image will be: If enabled, an open graph image will be generated for each page that has a title. Make sure that you already set the chrome binary in the config file.
If enabled, the logo will be added to th: If enabled, the logo will be added to the open graph image.
Choose the style of the logo to use in t: Choose the style of the logo to use in the open graph image.
If enabled, a screenshot of the page wil: If enabled, a screenshot of the page will be added to the open graph image.
Select the template to use for the open: Select the template to use for the open graph image. Changing the template or any of the settings will regenerate all open graph images for your pages, so choose your settings wisely.
Enter a title to use to preview the open: Enter a title to use to preview the open graph image.
Enter an image URL to use to preview the: Enter an image URL to use to preview the open graph image. (either image or snapshot will be used, not both, snapshot takes precedence).
Enter a URL of a site to take a snapshot: Enter a URL of a site to take a snapshot of to preview the open graph image. (either image or snapshot will be used, not both, snapshot takes precedence). Make sure above "Add Page Screenshot" is enabled.
Cannot render image, make sure the chrom: Cannot render image, make sure the chrome binary is set correctly in the config file "open-graphy.php".
This will be used as the meta descriptio: This will be used as the meta description for your site (for pages that have no description).
If enabled, customers will be able to ha: If enabled, customers will be able to have multiple active subscriptions at the same time.
This is the currency that will be used f: This is the currency that will be used for all payments.
If enabled, when a customer upgrades or: If enabled, when a customer upgrades or downgrades their subscription, the amount they have already paid will be prorated and credited towards their new plan.
This is the email provider that will be: This is the email provider that will be used for all emails.
This is the name that will be used as th: This is the name that will be used as the "From" name for all emails.
This is the email address that will be u: This is the email address that will be used as the "From" address for all emails.
Paste your Posthog HTML snippet here.
If enabled, customers will be able to se: If enabled, customers will be able to see their subscriptions on the dashboard.
If enabled, customers will be able to see their orders on the dashboard.
If enabled, customers will be able to see their transactions on the dashboard.
If enabled, the roadmap will be visible: If enabled, the roadmap will be visible to the public.
If enabled, recaptcha will be used on th: If enabled, recaptcha will be used on the registration & login forms. For more info on how to configure Recaptcha, see the documentation.
If enabled, invoices will be generated f: If enabled, invoices will be generated for each successful transaction. Customers will be able to see their invoices in their dashboard.
Check this box if you are using Lemon Sq: Check this box if you are using Lemon Squeezy in test mode.
Your account is blocked, please contact: Your account is blocked, please contact support.

The discount code has been removed.
Please tell us why you are canceling you: Please tell us why you are canceling your subscription.
Please tell us what we can do to improve: Please tell us what we can do to improve our product.

Suggest a feature or stay on top of what: Suggest a feature or stay on top of what we are working on.
A Laravel-based boilerplate with everyth: A Laravel-based boilerplate with everything you need to build an awesome SaaS.
Join the best SaaS developers who are us: Join the best SaaS developers who are using SaaSykit to build their SaaS.
Easily offer your customers subscription: Easily offer your customers subscription-based & one-time purchase products with SaaSykit. All the webhook handling, subscription management, and billing are already set up for you in a beautiful and easy-to-use admin panel.
Collect payments with Stripe and Paddle,: Collect payments with Stripe and Paddle, and manage your customers with ease.
Customize the primary & secondary colors: Customize the primary & secondary colors of your website, error pages, email templates, fonts, social sharing cards, favicons, and more.
Based on the popular TailwindCSS, you ca: Based on the popular TailwindCSS, you can easily customize the look and feel of your SaaS application.
Create and manage your products, plans,: Create and manage your products, plans, and pricing, set features for each plan, mark a plan as featured, and more.
Rewards your customers with discounts an: Rewards your customers with discounts and manage all that from a beautiful admin panel.
In a few clicks, your customers can subs: In a few clicks, your customers can subscribe to your service using a beautiful checkout page that shows all the details of the plan they are subscribing to, allowing them to add a coupon code if they have one, and choose their payment method.
Display testimonials from your customers: Display testimonials from your customers on your website and build trust with your potential customers.
This component is magical in that it wil: This component is magical in that it will read the plans you defined in your admin panel, group them, calculate potential discount amount if user chooses a longer plan, and display all that in a beautiful way for your users.
A ready-to-use hero section component to: A ready-to-use hero section component to display your hero image, title, and call to action button.
An accordion component that you can use: An accordion component that you can use to display your FAQ in an intuitive way.
A focused component the brings attention: A focused component the brings attention to your call to action.
Tab slider component displays your conte: Tab slider component displays your content in a beautiful and organized way into separate tabs.
Easily customize your header and footer.
Beautiful buttons to use in your applica: Beautiful buttons to use in your application.
Pills to highlight your content where yo: Pills to highlight your content where you need to.
View your MRR (monthly recurring revenue: View your MRR (monthly recurring revenue), Churn rates, ARPU (average revenue per user), and other SaaS metrics right inside your admin panel.
Choose your preferred email service from: Choose your preferred email service from options like Mailgun, Postmark, and Amazon SES to communicate with your customers.
SaaSykit comes with a beautiful email te: SaaSykit comes with a beautiful email template out of the box that takes your brand colors into consideration, along with the typical emails for customer registration, verification, resetting password, etc set up for you.
When it comes to reaching customer, noth: When it comes to reaching customer, nothing beats SEO.
SaaSykit comes with a ready blog system: SaaSykit comes with a ready blog system that you can use to publish articles and tutorials for your customers about your SaaS, which will help you with your SEO.
SaaSykit includes built-in user authenti: SaaSykit includes built-in user authentication, supporting both traditional email/password authentication and social login options such as Google, Facebook, Twitter, Github, LinkedIn, and more.
Manage your SaaS application from a beau: Manage your SaaS application from a beautiful admin panel powered by Filament
Manage your users, create roles and assi: Manage your users, create roles and assign permissions to your users.
Translate your application to any langua: Translate your application to any language you want.
Auto-generated sitemap and SEO optimizat: Auto-generated sitemap and SEO optimization out of the box.
Users can manage their subscriptions, ch: Users can manage their subscriptions, change payment method, upgrade plan, cancel subscription alone.
Manage your SaaS settings from within th: Manage your SaaS settings from within the admin panel. No need to redeploy app for simple changes anymore.
Built with developers in mind, uses best: Built with developers in mind, uses best coding practices. Offers handlers & events and automated tests covering critical components of the application.
Deploy your SaaS application to your ser: Deploy your SaaS application to your server with a single command, powered by
Everything you need to know to get start: Everything you need to know to get started.
SaaSykit's documentation is extensive an: SaaSykit's documentation is extensive and covers everything you need to know to get started with building your SaaS.
Here are the most common questions to he: Here are the most common questions to help you with your decision.
SaaSykit is a complete SaaS starter kit: SaaSykit is a complete SaaS starter kit that includes everything you need to start your SaaS business. It comes ready with a huge list of reusable components, a complete admin panel, user dashboard, user authentication, user & role management, plans & pricing, subscriptions, payments, emails, and more.
Here are some of the features included i: Here are some of the features included in SaaSykit in a nutshell:
Customize Styles: Customize the styles &: Customize Styles: Customize the styles & colors, error page of your application to fit your brand.
Product, Plans &amp; Pricing: Create and: Product, Plans & Pricing: Create and manage your products, plans, and pricing from a beautiful and easy-to-use admin panel.
Beautiful checkout process: Your custome: Beautiful checkout process: Your customers can subscribe to your plans from a beautiful checkout process.
Huge list of ready-to-use components: Pl: Huge list of ready-to-use components: Plans & Pricing, hero section, features section, testimonials, FAQ, Call to action, tab slider, and much more.
User authentication: Comes with user aut: User authentication: Comes with user authentication out of the box, whether classic email/password or social login (Google, Facebook, Twitter, Github, LinkedIn, and more).
Discounts: Create and manage your discou: Discounts: Create and manage your discounts and reward your customers.
SaaS metric stats: View your MRR, Churn: SaaS metric stats: View your MRR, Churn rates, ARPU, and other SaaS metrics.
Multiple payment providers: Stripe, Padd: Multiple payment providers: Stripe, Paddle, and more coming soon.
Multiple email providers: Mailgun, Postm: Multiple email providers: Mailgun, Postmark, Amazon SES, and more coming soon.
Blog: Create and manage your blog posts.
User &amp; Role Management: Create and m: User & Role Management: Create and manage your users and roles, and assign permissions to your users.
Fully translatable: Translate your appli: Fully translatable: Translate your application to any language you want.
Sitemap &amp; SEO: Sitemap and SEO optim: Sitemap & SEO: Sitemap and SEO optimization out of the box.
Admin Panel: Manage your SaaS applicatio: Admin Panel: Manage your SaaS application from a beautiful admin panel powered by
User Dashboard: Your customers can manag: User Dashboard: Your customers can manage their subscriptions, change payment method, upgrade plan, cancel subscription, and more from a beautiful user dashboard powered by
Automated Tests: Comes with automated te: Automated Tests: Comes with automated tests for critical components of the application.
One-line deployment: Provision your serv: One-line deployment: Provision your server and deploy your application easily with integrated
Developer-friendly: Built with developer: Developer-friendly: Built with developers in mind, uses best coding practices.
SaaSykit supports Stripe and Paddle out: SaaSykit supports Stripe and Paddle out of the box. You can easily add more payment providers by extending the code. More payment method will be added in the future as well (e.g. Lemon Squeezy)
Of course! we offer email and discord su: Of course! we offer email and discord support to help you with any issues you might face or questions you have. Write us an email at
SaaSykit is built on top of: SaaSykit is built on top of
Laravel, the most popular PHP framework,: Laravel, the most popular PHP framework, and
, a beautiful and powerful admin panel f: , a beautiful and powerful admin panel for Laravel. It also uses TailwindCSS, AlpineJS, and Livewire.
You can use your favourite database (MyS: You can use your favourite database (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite) and your favourite queue driver (Redis, Amazon SQS, etc).
SaaSykit is updated regularly to keep up: SaaSykit is updated regularly to keep up with the latest Laravel and Filament versions, and to add new features and improvements.
Yes, we offer a 14-day money-back guaran: Yes, we offer a 14-day money-back guarantee. If you are not satisfied with SaaSykit, you can request a refund within 14 days of your purchase. Please write us an email at
You can host your SaaS application on an: You can host your SaaS application on any server that supports PHP, such as DigitalOcean, AWS, Hetzner, Linode, and more. You can also use a platform like Laravel Forge to manage your server and deploy your application.
Yes, a demo is available to help you get: Yes, a demo is available to help you get a feel of SaaSykit. You can find the demo
Yes, an extensive documentation is avail: Yes, an extensive documentation is available to help you get started with SaaSykit. You can find the documentation
SaaSykit is built on top of Laravel with: SaaSykit is built on top of Laravel with the intention to save you time and effort by not having to build everything needed for a modern SaaS from scratch, like payment provider integration, subscription management, user authentication, user & role management, having a beautiful admin panel, a user dashboard to manage their subscriptions/payments, and more.
You can choose to base your SaaS on vani: You can choose to base your SaaS on vanilla Laravel and build everything from scratch if you prefer and that is totally fine, but you will need a few months to build what SaaSykit offers out of the box, then on top of that, you will need to start to build your actual SaaS application.
SaaSykit is a great starting point for y: SaaSykit is a great starting point for your SaaS application, it is built with best coding practices, and it is developer-friendly. It is also built with the intention to be easily customizable and extendable. Any developer who is familiar with Laravel will feel right at home.

To integrate Paddle with your applicatio: To integrate Paddle with your application, you need to do the following steps:
Under \"Developer Tools\" > \"Authentica: Under "Developer Tools" > "Authentication" you will find your Vendor Id (also referred to as seller ID). Enter it into the field in the form.
Under "Developer Tools" > "Authentication" > "Client-side tokens", click on "Generate client-side token". Once created, enter it into the field in the form.
On the same page, click on \"Generate AP: On the same page, click on "Generate API Key", and enter a name and a description for the key. Copy the generated key and enter it into the field in the form.
Head to \"Developer Tools\" > \"Notifica: Head to "Developer Tools" > "Notifications" and click on "New Destination". Enter a description for the webhook, and select "Webhook" as "Notification Type", and enter the URL below.
From the list of events, select all the: From the list of events, select all the events under "Transaction", "Subscription" and "Adjustment". So all the following events should be selected:
Click on \"Save Destination\" and copy t: Click on "Save Destination" and copy the generated webhook secret key and enter it into the field in the form.
In case you are installing this on a tes: In case you are installing this on a test environment, you can enable sandbox mode. This will use the Paddle sandbox environment instead of the live environment.
NEVER enable sandbox mode on a productio: NEVER enable sandbox mode on a production environment!
Head to \"Checkout\" > \"Checkout Settin: Head to "Checkout" > "Checkout Settings" and under "Default payment link", enter the following URL:
To integrate Lemon Squeezy with your app: To integrate Lemon Squeezy with your application, you need to do the following steps:
On the left menu, click on \"Settings\": On the left menu, click on "Settings" > "API". Click on the "+" sign on the right to create a new API key. Give the API key a name and click "Create API Key". Copy the generated key into the form in the field called "API key".
On the same page, on the left menu, clic: On the same page, on the left menu, click on "Settings" > "Stores". Copy the store id ("#xxxxx") without the # into the "Store ID" field.
On the same page, on the left menu, click on "Settings" > "Webhooks". Click on "+" to create a new webhook and enter the URL below.
Generate a new webhook signing secret an: Generate a new webhook signing secret and copy it into the form in the field called "Signing Secret" and also into the "Signing secret" field in the Lemon Squeezy Webhook creation form.
to generate a secure webhook signing se: to generate a secure webhook signing secret.
Click on \"Save Webhook\" and copy the g: Click on "Save Webhook" and copy the generated webhook signing secret and enter it into the field in the form.
To integrate Stripe with your applicatio: To integrate Stripe with your application, you need to do the following steps:
Depending whether you want to use the te: Depending whether you want to use the test or live environment, you might need to tick the "Test mode" switch in the top right corner.
On the top menu, click on \"Developers\": On the top menu, click on "Developers" > "API keys". Copy the "Publishable key" and enter it into the field in the form.
On the same page, click \"Reveal live ke: On the same page, click "Reveal live key token" and copy the "Secret key" and enter it into the field in the form.
On the same page, click on \"Webhooks\": On the same page, click on "Webhooks" tab. Click on "Add endpoint" and enter the URL below.
Click on \"Select events\" then select a: Click on "Select events" then select all the following events:
Click on \"Add endpoint\" and copy the g: Click on "Add endpoint" and copy the generated webhook signing secret and enter it into the field in the form.
It might take a few moments for your sub: It might take a few moments for your subscription to be updated.
You will be charged a prorated amount th: You will be charged a prorated amount that covers the difference between your current plan and your new plan for the remainder of the current billing period.
Cancel anytime in account settings at le: Cancel anytime in account settings at least one day before each renewal date. Plan automatically renews until cancelled. Your billing date may not line up with your apprenticeship start date.

Once you cancel, your subscription will: Once you cancel, your subscription will be active until the end of your billing period. You will be able to continue using the service until the end of your billing period.
